note: CSE 20 is equivalent to MATH 15A./ Students who have credit for Math 109 may not receive credit for CSE 20. Students may enroll in CSE 20 concurrently with CSE 8B or CSE 11, but must be officially enrolled in one of these courses to be given clearance. Waitlisting CSE 8B or CSE 11 is not sufficient for CSE 20 clearance. For more information about enrollment and waitlist see: https://go.ucsd.edu/48sDB53
